---
title: "Map"
freeze: false
page-layout: full
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
raw_paddles <- readRDS("data/raw_paddles.rds")

gpoly_to_sfpoly <- function(gpoly) {
  coords <- googlePolylines::decode(gpoly)
  sfg <- lapply(coords, function(x) {
    sf::st_linestring(x = as.matrix(x[, c(2, 1)]))
  })
  sfc <- sf::st_sfc(sfg, crs = 4326)
  return(sfc)
}

paddle_geom <-
  raw_paddles |>
   dplyr::filter(!is.na(map.summary_polyline) & map.summary_polyline != "") |>
   dplyr::mutate(geom = gpoly_to_sfpoly(map.summary_polyline)) |>
    dplyr::mutate(id = as.numeric(id)) |>
    dplyr::select(id, name, start_date, distance, geom) |>
    sf::st_as_sf() |>
    sf::st_set_crs(4326) 

paddle_geom  |>
  dplyr::mutate(label = glue::glue("<b>{name}</b>  <br>
                   Date: {lubridate::date(start_date)} <br>
                   Distance: {round(distance, 1)}k")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(label = purrr::map(label, htmltools::HTML)) |>
  leaflet::leaflet(width = "100%", height = 700) |>
  leaflet::addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Voyager") |>
  leaflet::addPolylines(
    weight = 5,
    color = "purple",
    opacity = 1,
    label = ~label
  ) |>
  leaflet::setView(-3, 56, zoom = 7) |>
  leaflet.extras::addFullscreenControl()
```
